task_completion.description: Navigate to the Odoo Calendar and locate the 'Legal Contract Review' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar view is open, and the 'Legal Contract Review' event is visible on Thursday.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Legal Contract Review' event for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed form view for the 'Legal Contract Review' event is open in edit mode.

task_completion.description: Check the 'All Day' checkbox for the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'All Day' checkbox is ticked/checked in the event form.
The attendees field in the event form still lists 'Karen Lee' and 'Bob Williams'.
The location field in the event form still displays 'Legal Conference Room'.
The event is saved, indicated by the form returning to a read-only state with 'All Day' checked, or the calendar view showing the event moved to the top 'all-day' section for Thursday.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo UI, not a terminal executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are open to manipulate the DOM.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the changes in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved state of the event (e.g., a 'Save' button was clicked and the UI reflects the saved record), rather than just leaving the form in an unsaved edit state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Event: 'Legal Contract Review'. Expected Attendees: 'Karen Lee' and 'Bob Williams'. Expected Location: 'Legal Conference Room'. The task requires changing this specific event to an 'All Day' event while keeping the attendees, location, and description exactly the same.
